data.body:
BRAINSTORM decision log (5/N) — OSS build-vs-import & standards review (2nd subagent, Joe-requested).

Bottom line: of 6 build areas, 5 have a maintained lib to IMPORT; only the derived-index/invariants + rebar-specific front-matter extensions are genuinely bespoke. Two things that will SILENTLY bite: mixed JSON Schema drafts, and execution_mode-on-prompt (a conscious divergence).

IMPORT (do not reinvent):
1. MCP CLIENT — reuse pydantic_ai's MCP client (MCPServerStdio/StreamableHTTP, on the official 'mcp' SDK 1.28+) for stdio+http, initialize handshake, tools/list, subprocess teardown. Drop to the 'mcp' SDK ClientSession directly for manifest work (pagination, list_changed, outputSchema validation). Pin pydantic_ai (MCPServer* collapse into MCPToolset, removed in v2). DO NOT write our own transport/handshake.
2. LOSSLESS FRONT-MATTER — python-frontmatter (split body/FM) + a CUSTOM HANDLER delegating to a shared ruamel.yaml YAML(typ='rt'); edit the CommentedMap IN PLACE (never rebuild dicts). PyYAML default re-sorts keys + drops comments = the exact corruption item-4 forbids. Caveat: ruamel normalizes indent/bool/null + loses block-scalar style on REASSIGNMENT (won't-fix) => add a golden round-trip test.
3. JSON SCHEMA SUBTYPE (v1.1 deep type-check) — IMPORT jsonsubschema (IBM, ISSTA'21, Apache-2.0, maintained 2026). isSubschema(producer,consumer). Caveats: targets draft-04 (canonicalize/down-convert our 2020-12 first); returns true/false/UNKNOWN => treat unknown as FAIL-CLOSED (matches our 3-state validator). Hand-rolling subsumption is a multi-month near-undecidable trap.
4. JSON SCHEMA VALIDATION + $ref registry — jsonschema 4.26 + 'referencing' (Registry().with_resources + Draft202012Validator(registry=)). RefResolver is deprecated since 4.18; catch referencing Unresolvable. Avoid fastjsonschema (no 2020-12).
5. CLIENT-SIDE EDITOR VALIDATION — Ajv 8 but import Ajv2020 (not default draft-07-only) + ajv-formats, strict:false (Ajv8 strict THROWS at compile on unknown keywords/formats => breaks live validation). bpmn-js bundles no usable validator; do NOT use @bpmn-io/json-schema-validator (pinned to Ajv6).

CONFORM-TO (standards):
6. JSON SCHEMA DRAFT = 2020-12 EVERYWHERE. pydantic v2 emits 2020-12; MCP SEP-1613 mandates 2020-12. Our hand-written output schemas may be Draft-07 => MIGRATE don't relabel (definitions->$defs, items[]+additionalItems->prefixItems+items; relabeling $schema alone silently mis-validates tuples). Audit docs/output-schemas.md canonical schemas before the registry lands.
7. MCP RESULT SHAPE (2025-06-18): opaque-any is right for no-outputSchema, but ALSO validate structuredContent vs outputSchema when present + feed those fields to the expression validator; handle isError:true; don't read only content[].
8. MCP MANIFEST: follow tools/list nextCursor PAGINATION (else silent truncation) + invalidate on notifications/tools/list_changed; stamp manifest with TTL/version.
9. MCP TOOL ANNOTATIONS (readOnlyHint/destructiveHint/idempotentHint/openWorldHint) drive allowlist UX/defaults — but they're UNTRUSTED hints (default worst-case when absent); the explicit allowlist stays the trust boundary.
10. MCP REMOTE AUTH = OAuth 2.1 for HTTP, env creds for stdio — model the two SEPARATELY; lean on the client lib, don't store bare tokens. Flat 'secrets for auth' under-specifies HTTP.

OWN-IT (bespoke, fine): derived-index lockfile + invariants; step contracts AS JSON Schema (CloudEvents/AsyncAPI/OpenAPI standardize envelopes/transport, not intra-workflow step I/O — JSON Schema by-name is correct, consistent with MCP inputSchema/outputSchema).

BORROW / FIX:
11. FRONT-MATTER VOCAB: align field names with Microsoft Prompty (model/inputs/outputs/description/sample/tags) where they overlap; execution_mode + dimension/applies_to + schema-name indirection are rebar extensions layered on the Prompty-shaped base. Don't invent new spellings.
12. applies_to globs — IMPORT pathspec (GitIgnoreSpec) or 'codeowners'; don't hand-roll; pin which semantics.
13. execution_mode-on-prompt is a REAL divergence from every typed-prompt peer (DSPy/BAML/pydantic-ai all separate typed contract from execution strategy). Joe chose it consciously (one-prompt-one-strategy); document as deliberate, don't claim DSPy parity.
